description: Engineers in a cleanroom must integrate a high-resolution camera payload onto a satellite bus.

nodes.task_description: Follow the integration procedure document to mechanically and electrically connect the payload to the satellite bus.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent follows the checklist and completes all connections.

nodes.task_description: Run a series of functional tests to verify that the payload is receiving power and can communicate with the bus.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs the tests and confirms all communications are nominal.

nodes.task_description: Document the completion of the integration and testing steps in the satellite's assembly log.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately updates the assembly log.
